```json
        "originalContents": "\n\nexport function ProtectedRoute({ children }: ProtectedRouteProps) {\n  const { user, loading } = useAuth()\n  const router = useRouter()\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (!loading \u0026\u0026 !user) {\n      router.push('/auth')\n    }\n  }, [user, loading, router])\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      \u003cdiv className=\"min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-50\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className=\"animate-spin rounded-full h-32 w-32 border-b-2\" style={{ borderBottomColor: '#3e8692' }}\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n      \u003c/div\u003e\n    )\n  }\n\n  if (!user) {\n    return null // Will redirect\n  }\n\n  return \u003c\u003e{children}\u003c/\u003e\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport default function FloatingChat() {\n  const { userProfile } = useAuth();\n  const pathname = usePathname();\n\n  // Hide chat entirely on auth page or when user is not logged in\n  if (!userProfile || pathname?.startsWith('/auth')) {\n    return null;\n  }\n  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [isMinimized, setIsMinimized] = useState(false);\n  const [sessions, setSessions] = useState\u003cChatSessionWithMessages[]\u003e([]);\n  const [currentSession, setCurrentSession] = useState\u003cChatSessionWithMessages | null\u003e(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [sending, setSending] = useState(false);\n  const [message, setMessage] = useState('');\n  const [aiSuggestion, setAiSuggestion] = useState\u003c{ type: 'campaign' | 'list'; suggestion: CampaignSuggestion | ListSuggestion } | null\u003e(null);\n  const [showTemplates, setShowTemplates] = useState(false);\n  const [messageContext, setMessageContext] = useState\u003cMessageContext\u003e({});\n  const [showAdvancedInsights, setShowAdvancedInsights] = useState(false);\n  const [advancedInsights, setAdvancedInsights] = useState\u003cPredictiveInsight[]\u003e([]);\n  const { toast } = useToast();\n  const messagesEndRef = useRef\u003cHTMLDivElement\u003e(null);\n  const [isTyping, setIsTyping] = useState(false);\n  const [showSessionSelector, setShowSessionSelector] = useState(false);\n  const [deleteDialogOpen, setDeleteDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [sessionToDelete, setSessionToDelete] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (isOpen \u0026\u0026 !currentSession) {\n      initializeChat();\n    }\n  }, [isOpen]);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    scrollToBottom();\n  }, [currentSession?.messages]);\n\n  const scrollToBottom = () =\u003e {\n    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });\n  };",

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport default function FloatingChat() {\n  const { userProfile } = useAuth();\n  const pathname = usePathname();\n\n  // Hide chat entirely on auth page or when user is not logged in\n  if (!userProfile || pathname?.startsWith('/auth')) {\n    return null;\n  }\n  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [isMinimized, setIsMinimized] = useState(false);\n  const [sessions, setSessions] = useState\u003cChatSessionWithMessages[]\u003e([]);\n  const [currentSession, setCurrentSession] = useState\u003cChatSessionWithMessages | null\u003e(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [sending, setSending] = useState(false);\n  const [message, setMessage] = useState('');\n  const [aiSuggestion, setAiSuggestion] = useState\u003c{ type: 'campaign' | 'list'; suggestion: CampaignSuggestion | ListSuggestion } | null\u003e(null);\n  const [showTemplates, setShowTemplates] = useState(false);\n  const [messageContext, setMessageContext] = useState\u003cMessageContext\u003e({});\n  const [showAdvancedInsights, setShowAdvancedInsights] = useState(false);\n  const [advancedInsights, setAdvancedInsights] = useState\u003cPredictiveInsight[]\u003e([]);\n  const { toast } = useToast();\n  const messagesEndRef = useRef\u003cHTMLDivElement\u003e(null);\n  const [isTyping, setIsTyping] = useState(false);\n  const [showSessionSelector, setShowSessionSelector] = useState(false);\n  const [deleteDialogOpen, setDeleteDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [sessionToDelete, setSessionToDelete] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (isOpen \u0026\u0026 !currentSession) {\n      initializeChat();\n    }\n  }, [isOpen]);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    scrollToBottom();\n  }, [currentSession?.messages]);\n\n  const scrollToBottom = () =\u003e {\n    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });\n  };",

        "contents": "export default function TeamPage() {\n              ...\n              {\n              ...\n              {filteredTeamMembers.map((member) =\u003e (\n\n                    ...\n\n                    \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-col items-center text-center\"\u003e\n                      {member.profile_photo_url ? (\n                        \u003cdiv className=\"w-16 h-16 rounded-full overflow-hidden mb-3 relative\"\u003e\n                          \u003cimg \n                            src={member.profile_photo_url} \n                            alt={&#96;${member.name || 'User'} profile&#96;}\n                            className=\"w-full h-full object-cover\"\n                            onError={(e) =\u003e {\n                              // Fallback to initials if image fails to load\n                              const target = e.target as HTMLImageElement;\n                              target.style.display = 'none';\n                              target.nextElementSibling?.classList.remove('hidden');\n                            }}\n                          /\u003e\n                          \u003cdiv className=\"w-16 h-16 bg-gradient-to-br from-[#3e8692] to-[#2d6470] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center absolute top-0 left-0 hidden\"\u003e\n                            \u003cspan className=\"text-white font-bold text-xl\"\u003e\n                              {getUserInitials(member.name || member.email)}\n                            \u003c/span\u003e\n                          \u003c/div\u003e\n                        \u003c/div\u003e\n                      ) : (\n                        \u003cdiv className=\"w-16 h-16 bg-gradient-to-br from-[#3e8692] to-[#2d6470] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-3\"\u003e\n                          \u003cspan className=\"text-white font-bold text-xl\"\u003e\n <think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
```
**Considering filter UI implementation**

I’m thinking we need to add a filter UI in the lists add dialog, styled like the bulk menu on the KOLs page. It might be best to create a card-like section with basic filters, like Platform and Region, potentially using the MultiSelect component from that page. Time is tight, so a simplified filter bar with a search input could work too. I'll aim to replicate the styling for consistency while keeping everything functional.
**Updating KOL filter functionality**

I can call KOLService.getFieldOptions() to fetch the platforms and regions. It makes sense to add state for filterPlatform and filterRegion, applying them to filteredAvailableKOLs, which is currently based on kolSearchTerm. I’ll update the filter logic in app/lists/page.tsx and define a new state with minimal attributes for platform and region. I plan to create a “Filter KOLs” UI above the KOLs table, utilizing either the Select component or a custom MultiSelect. I'll ensure to import the necessary components for this.
**Implementing patch on lists/page.tsx**

I’m ready to apply a patch to lists/page.tsx. First, I need to import the Select components. Then, I’ll define the necessary state and modify the filteredAvailableKOLs function accordingly. My next step is to insert the UI section around line 748, just before the table. I want to be careful to keep the code minimal and straightforward while ensuring it fits seamlessly into the existing structure. Let's get started on this!</details></think>

```diff
-                    &lt;div className="grid gap-2"&gt;

+                      &lt;Label&gt;Select KOLs ({newList.selectedKOLs.length} selected)&lt;/Label&gt;

+                        &lt;div className="flex flex-wrap items-end gap-3"&gt;
+                          {/* Search */}
+                          &lt;div className="min-w-[220px] flex flex-col items-start justify-end"&gt;
+                            &lt;span className="text-xs text-gray-600 font-semibold mb-1"&gt;Search&lt;/span&gt;
+                            &lt;Input
+                              placeholder="Search KOLs by name, region, or platform..."
+                              className="auth-input"
+                              value={kolSearchTerm}
+                              onChange={e =&gt; setKolSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
+                            /&gt;
+                          &lt;/div&gt;
+                          {/* Platform filter (single-select for simplicity) */}
+                          &lt;div className="min-w-[160px] flex flex-col items-start justify-end"&gt;
+                            &lt;span className="text-xs text-gray-600 font-semibold mb-1"&gt;Platform&lt;/span&gt;
+                            &lt;Select onValueChange={(val) =&gt; setKolSearchTerm(prev =&gt; prev.split(' ').filter(x=&gt;!x.startsWith('platform:')).concat(val ? [&#96;platform:${val}&#96;] : []).join(' '))}&gt;
+                              &lt;SelectTrigger className="h-7 min-h-[28px] px-2 py-1 text-xs"&gt;
+                                &lt;SelectValue placeholder="All" /&gt;
+                              &lt;/SelectTrigger&gt;

+                                &lt;SelectItem value="Facebook"&gt;Facebook&lt;/SelectItem&gt;

+                            &lt;span className="text-xs text-gray-600 font-semibold mb-1"&gt;Region&lt;/span&gt;
+                            &lt;Select onValueChange={(val) =&gt; setKolSearchTerm(prev =&gt; prev.split(' ').filter(x=&gt;!x.startsWith('region:')).concat(val ? [&#96;region:${val}&#96;] : []).join(' '))}&gt;
+                              &lt;SelectTrigger className="h-7 min-h-[28px] px-2 py-1 text-xs"&gt;
```

_**Agent (default)**_

- Added a compact filter bar to the Add New List popup, styled to match the KOLs page bulk menu:
  - Search input
  - Platform dropdown (X, Telegram, YouTube, Facebook, TikTok)
  - Region dropdown (Vietnam, Turkey, SEA, Philippines, Korea, Global, China, Brazil)

- Increased dialog max width (`max-w-5xl`) earlier for more room.

- Fixed duplicate Select imports. Existing type errors in `app/lists/page.tsx` are pre-existing and unrelated to this UI addition.

If you want, I can wire the platform/region selects to filter logic beyond the current search term approach.

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Providing concise fixes**

I need to respond with clear, proposed fixes for the user's issues. For the Radix Select error, I suggest changing the `<SelectItem value="">All</SelectItem>` to `value="all"` and managing state in the dialog instead of mutating the search term. Also, the FloatingChat hooks warning suggests rearranging the code to call hooks before returning, or using conditional rendering. It’s essential to provide quick, clear instructions without applying code unless the user requests it.
**Clarifying issues and fixes**

It seems like we're using `setKolSearchTerm` correctly in the `onValueChange`, but the warning could arise from the empty value causing Radix to throw an error. Fixing that should help.

Regarding hydration, the `inject_newvt_svd` attribute might be due to an extension or external script, so I suggest clearing any extensions or checking for non-deterministic attributes. 

Lastly, in the FloatingChat, there’s a violation of hook rules because it returns null before `useState`, which is not ideal. We need to ensure that hooks are called in the same order on every render.
**Addressing hook usage issues**

I need to clarify something important about using hooks: they shouldn’t be conditionally called. In this case, `useState` is called after an early return, which leads to issues when the user’s authentication state changes between renders — hence the React warning. 

To fix this, I suggest moving early returns after all hook declarations or using a flag to handle rendering. It’s best to call all hooks on every render. Instead of returning early, I can compute a condition to return null at the end if necessary.
**Suggesting code snippets**

I'll present a couple of small code changes to address the issues. 

For the FloatingChat, I recommend moving the early return: first, define `isHidden`, and then check it—if true, return null, but make sure this comes after declaring all hooks. 

Regarding the `SelectItem` value, I think changing it to "all-..." is a good idea. We should also add state for `platformFilter` and `regionFilter`, and update `filteredAvailableKOLs` accordingly to include matches, while keeping everything concise for a quick status update.</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

I’ll fix three things:

- Radix Select crash: change “All” items to non-empty values and stop mutating search via empty value
- FloatingChat hooks order: remove early return before hooks so order is stable
- Hydration warning: likely from the Select error chain; the fixes above should eliminate it

What I’ll change

1) Add New List popup Selects (no empty values)
- Replace SelectItem value="" with value="all"
- Track filters in local state and filter KOLs from those states (not by stuffing into the search string)

Example edits in app/lists/page.tsx:
- Add local state near other new-list state:
  - const [platformFilter, setPlatformFilter] = useState<'all'|'X'|'Telegram'|'YouTube'|'Facebook'|'TikTok'>('all');
  - const [regionFilter, setRegionFilter] = useState<'all'|'Vietnam'|'Turkey'|'SEA'|'Philippines'|'Korea'|'Global'|'China'|'Brazil'>('all');

- In the filter bar, change Selects:
  - Platform Select: onValueChange={setPlatformFilter}; items use value="all", "X", "Telegram", "YouTube", "Facebook", "TikTok"
  - Region Select: onValueChange={setRegionFilter}; items use value="all", "Vietnam", etc.

- Update filteredAvailableKOLs:
  - Add platform condition: platformFilter === 'all' || (Array.isArray(kol.platform) && kol.platform.includes(platformFilter))
  - Add region condition: regionFilter === 'all' || kol.region === regionFilter

2) Fix FloatingChat hook order (components/ai/FloatingChat.tsx)
- Don’t return before declaring hooks. Replace:
  if (!userProfile || pathname?.startsWith('/auth')) { return null; }
- With:
  const isHidden = !userProfile || pathname?.startsWith('/auth');
  (declare all useState/useEffect hooks as before)
  if (isHidden) return null;

3) Radix “Cannot update during render” warning
- This was triggered by the invalid empty SelectItem value and dev overlay. Using non-empty values and simple setState in onValueChange resolves it.

After you apply these, the errors should go away:
- No more “Select.Item must have a value prop that is not an empty string”
- No more hook order warning in FloatingChat
- Hydration warning should clear once Select stops erroring

Want me to apply these edits now?

```diff
   const [kolSearchTerm, setKolSearchTerm] = useState('');
+  const [platformFilter, setPlatformFilter] = useState&lt;'all' | 'X' | 'Telegram' | 'YouTube' | 'Facebook' | 'TikTok'&gt;('all');
+  const [regionFilter, setRegionFilter] = useState&lt;'all' | 'Vietnam' | 'Turkey' | 'SEA' | 'Philippines' | 'Korea' | 'Global' | 'China' | 'Brazil'&gt;('all');
+  const [platformFilterSearch, setPlatformFilterSearch] = useState('');
+  const [regionFilterSearch, setRegionFilterSearch] = useState('');
@@
-  // Filter KOLs based on search term
-  const filteredAvailableKOLs = allKOLs.filter((kol: any) =&gt;
-    kol.name.toLowerCase().includes(kolSearchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
-    (kol.region &amp;&amp; kol.region.toLowerCase().includes(kolSearchTerm.toLowerCase())) ||
-    (Array.isArray(kol.platform) &amp;&amp; kol.platform.some((p: string) =&gt; p.toLowerCase().includes(kolSearchTerm.toLowerCase())))
-  );
+  // Filter KOLs based on search term + dropdown filters
+  const filteredAvailableKOLs = allKOLs.filter((kol: any) =&gt; {
+    const matchesSearch =
+      kol.name?.toLowerCase().includes(kolSearchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
+      (kol.region &amp;&amp; kol.region.toLowerCase().includes(kolSearchTerm.toLowerCase())) ||
+      (Array.isArray(kol.platform) &amp;&amp; kol.platform.some((p: string) =&gt; p.toLowerCase().includes(kolSearchTerm.toLowerCase())));
+
+    const matchesPlatform =
+      platformFilter === 'all' || (Array.isArray(kol.platform) &amp;&amp; kol.platform.includes(platformFilter));
+
+    const matchesRegion = regionFilter === 'all' || kol.region === regionFilter;
+
+    return matchesSearch &amp;&amp; matchesPlatform &amp;&amp; matchesRegion;
+  });
*** End Patch
```

```diff
-                                &lt;SelectItem value="all"&gt;All&lt;/SelectItem&gt;
-                                &lt;SelectItem value="X"&gt;X&lt;/SelectItem&gt;
-                                &lt;SelectItem value="Telegram"&gt;Telegram&lt;/SelectItem&gt;
-                                &lt;SelectItem value="YouTube"&gt;YouTube&lt;/SelectItem&gt;
-                                &lt;SelectItem value="Facebook"&gt;Facebook&lt;/SelectItem&gt;
-                                &lt;SelectItem value="TikTok"&gt;TikTok&lt;/SelectItem&gt;
+                                {['all','X','Telegram','YouTube','Facebook','TikTok']
+                                  .filter(v =&gt; v.toLowerCase().includes(platformFilterSearch.toLowerCase()))
+                                  .map(v =&gt; (
+                                    &lt;SelectItem key={v} value={v}&gt;{v === 'all' ? 'All' : v}&lt;/SelectItem&gt;
+                                  ))}
                               &lt;/SelectContent&gt;
                             &lt;/Select&gt;
                           &lt;/div&gt;
-                          {/* Region filter (single-select) */}
+                          {/* Region filter (single-select + searchable) */}
                           &lt;div className="min-w-[160px] flex flex-col items-start justify-end"&gt;
                             &lt;span className="text-xs text-gray-600 font-semibold mb-1"&gt;Region&lt;/span&gt;
-                            &lt;Select onValueChange={(val) =&gt; setKolSearchTerm(prev =&gt; prev.split(' ').filter(x=&gt;!x.startsWith('region:')).concat(val ? [&#96;region:${val}&#96;] : []).join(' '))}&gt;
+                            &lt;Select onValueChange={(val) =&gt; setRegionFilter((val as any) || 'all')}&gt;
                               &lt;SelectTrigger className="border-none shadow-none bg-transparent h-7 min-h-[28px] px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium inline-flex items-center gap-1 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none"&gt;
                                 &lt;SelectValue placeholder="All" /&gt;
                               &lt;/SelectTrigger&gt;
                               &lt;SelectContent&gt;
+                                &lt;div className="p-2"&gt;
+                                  &lt;Input
+                                    placeholder="Search regions..."
+                                    className="h-7 text-xs"
+                                    value={regionFilterSearch}
+                                    onChange={(e) =&gt; setRegionFilterSearch(e.target.value)}
+                                  /&gt;
+                                &lt;/div&gt;
-                                &lt;SelectItem value="all"&gt;All&lt;/SelectItem&gt;
-                                &lt;SelectItem value="Vietnam"&gt;Vietnam&lt;/SelectItem&gt;
-                                &lt;SelectItem value="Turkey"&gt;Turkey&lt;/SelectItem&gt;

+                                  ))}
```

_**Agent (default)**_

- Separated filters from the search bar: added `platformFilter` and `regionFilter` states and updated `filteredAvailableKOLs` to combine free-text search with dropdown filters. The search bar will no longer be filled by platform/region selections.
- Made both Platform and Region dropdowns searchable like the bulk edit menu by adding a small search input inside each dropdown and filtering the item list live (without affecting the main search).

- Dropdown styling matches the bulk menu’s compact look (borderless, h-7 triggers, text-xs labels).

The remaining TypeScript lints in `app/lists/page.tsx` are pre-existing DB typing issues and unrelated to this UI change. If you want, I can address those in a separate pass.

For the platform, I'll show the icon with getPlatformIcon. For regions, I can utilize getRegionIcon, which we've already seen in the lists table. For content types, I'll apply getNewContentTypeColor or a similar function.
**Modifying triggers for colored pills**

I need to adjust triggers to display colored pills effectively. For platforms, each selected option should show a neutral-colored pill using a background style similar to the KOLs bulk menu. I'll use getPlatformIcon when rendering selected values, similar to how it's done in the KOLs trigger content.

For regions, I plan to show flags alongside the text. When it comes to content types, I can apply getContentTypeColor to style the pills appropriately. I’ll need to import the functions getPlatformIcon, getContentTypeColor, and getRegionIcon since they should already be defined in the file we've been using.
**Creating classNames for chips**

I want to adjust the KOLs MultiSelect so that the option rendering uses renderOption, while I also define the markup directly for the triggers chips. I'll make these changes in app/lists/page.tsx, particularly where we modified the filters earlier.

For the content types, I'll ensure to use getContentTypeColor for the correct classes. Each platform chip will have a class name including padding styles, rounded corners, and font properties, plus the icon. The region chip will flexibly display the flag and text, while the content type chip uses the colored span from getContentTypeColor.
```diff
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: app/lists/page.tsx
@@
 export default function ListsPage() {
@@
   const [contentTypeFilterSearch, setContentTypeFilterSearch] = useState('');
@@
   const { toast } = useToast();
+
+  // Multi-select dropdown component (identical styling to KOLs bulk menu)
+  const MultiSelect = ({ 
+    options, 
+    selected, 
+    onSelectedChange, 
+    placeholder = "Select options...",
+    renderOption = (option: string) =&gt; option,
+    className = "",
+    triggerContent = null
+  }: {
+    options: string[];
+    selected: string[];
+    onSelectedChange: (selected: string[]) =&gt; void;
+    placeholder?: string;
+    renderOption?: (option: string) =&gt; React.ReactNode;
+    className?: string;
+    triggerContent?: React.ReactNode;
+  }) =&gt; {
+    const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
+    const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
+
+    const safeOptions = Array.isArray(options) ? options : [];
+    const safeSelected = Array.isArray(selected) ? selected : [];
+
+    const filteredOptions = safeOptions.filter(option =&gt; 
+      option.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase())
+    );
+
+    return (
+      &lt;Popover open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}&gt;
+        &lt;PopoverTrigger asChild&gt;
+          {triggerContent ? (
+            &lt;div className={&#96;cursor-pointer w-full ${className}&#96;}&gt;
+              {triggerContent}
+            &lt;/div&gt;
+          ) : (
+            &lt;Button
+              variant="outline"
+              role="combobox"
+              aria-expanded={open}
+              className={&#96;h-auto border-none shadow-none p-1 bg-transparent hover:bg-transparent text-xs font-medium inline-flex items-center ${className}&#96;}
+            &gt;
+              &lt;svg className="h-3 w-3" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+                &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M19 9l-7 7-7-7" /&gt;
+              &lt;/svg&gt;
+            &lt;/Button&gt;
+          )}
+        &lt;/PopoverTrigger&gt;
+        &lt;PopoverContent className="w-[220px] p-0" align="start"&gt;
+          &lt;div className="flex items-center border-b px-3 py-2"&gt;
+            &lt;Search className="mr-2 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 opacity-50" /&gt;
+            &lt;Input
+              placeholder="Search..."
+              value={searchTerm}
+              onChange={(e) =&gt; setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
+              className="border-0 p-0 h-auto focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:ring-offset-0"
+            /&gt;
+          &lt;/div&gt;
+          &lt;div className="max-h-[300px] overflow-auto"&gt;
+            {filteredOptions.length === 0 ? (
+              &lt;div className="p-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground"&gt;No options found.&lt;/div&gt;
+            ) : (
+              filteredOptions.map((option) =&gt; (
+                &lt;div
+                  key={option}
+                  className="relative flex w-full cursor-default select-none items-center rounded-sm py-1.5 pl-8 pr-2 text-sm outline-none hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground"
+                  onClick={() =&gt; {
+                    const newSelected = safeSelected.includes(option)
+                      ? safeSelected.filter(item =&gt; item !== option)
+                      : [...safeSelected, option];
+                    onSelectedChange(newSelected);
+                  }}
+                &gt;
+                  &lt;span className="absolute left-2 flex h-3.5 w-3.5 items-center justify-center"&gt;
+                    {safeSelected.includes(option) &amp;&amp; (
+                      &lt;svg className="h-4 w-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+                        &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="m5 12 5 5L20 7" /&gt;
+                      &lt;/svg&gt;
+                    )}
+                  &lt;/span&gt;
+                  &lt;div className="flex items-center space-x-2"&gt;
+                    {renderOption(option)}
+                  &lt;/div&gt;
+                &lt;/div&gt;
+              ))
+            )}
+          &lt;/div&gt;
+        &lt;/PopoverContent&gt;
+      &lt;/Popover&gt;
+    );
+  };
*** End Patch
```
